title: Huelva, Andalusia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Huelva, Andalusia: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Huelva is a city in Andalusia with a population of 148,000. A coastal city in western Andalusia with links to Columbus, beautiful Doñana National Park, and fresh seafood.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
